title: Santa Clarita Criminal Defense Lawyer - Farris Law Firm
metaDescription: Santa Clarita Criminal Defense Lawyer You Can Trust: Facing charges in Santa Clarita? The Farris Law Firm offers personalized, aggressive defense.
contentHtml:
While Santa Clarita is considered a beacon of safety in the Golden State, crimes still occur, even though they’re much lower than the average state rate.

If you need a criminal defense lawyer in Santa Clarita, you can find the legal support and advocacy you need. Call the Farris Law Firm to ensure a better outcome in your case.

Whether you’re charged with robbery, aggravated assault, or grand theft auto in Santa Clarita, the legal team at the Farris Law Firm has local relationships in the court system and with the DA that gives them a decided edge.

Why You Should Call the Farris Law Firm

When you are charged with a crime in Santa Clarita, California, you need legal representation or a defense attorney who knows the local courts and how to protect your rights. At the Farris Law Firm, we offer an assertive and strategic criminal defense to clients throughout Santa Clarita.

How to Get In Touch and Where You’ll Find Us

Call (818) 861-0861 – day or night. We’re committed to helping you get a fair criminal defense. You’ll find us in downtown Burbank. We are near Griffith Observatory and the famous Hollywood sign.

You’ll find us at 300 North Third Street, Suite 116, Burbank, CA 91502. We won’t stretch ourselves thin. We will take on Valley cases or local defenses first before accepting cases hundreds of miles away.

Providing a Criminal Defense in Santa Clarita

The criminal justice system can be challenging, especially when facing aggressive prosecutors with unlimited resources. The local District Attorney’s office is tough on crime and will often seek maximum penalties, even for first-time offenders. Without professional legal representation, you may take a plea deal that doesn’t serve you or miss opportunities to have the evidence suppressed or charges reduced.

Our team at the Farris Law Firm has the experience needed to serve clients who face misdemeanor or felony charges in Santa Clarita. We know the local court system, have relationships with prosecutors and court staff, and know how to get you through the legal process.

Criminal Defense Services

At the Farris Law Firm, we handle all types of criminal cases in Santa Clarita and the surrounding areas:

Driving Under the Influence (DUI). We defend first-time and repeat offenders, standard DUI cases, and complicated cases involving injuries, commercial drivers, and felony charges. We know California’s DUI laws inside and out and will protect your driver’s license while fighting for the best result.

Violent Crime Defense. If you are charged with assault, battery, domestic violence, or weapons charges, we offer defense strategies based on a thorough investigation and evidence. We know that violent crime allegations can destroy your personal and professional life, and we will work to protect your rights and reputation.

Drug Offense Drug. Charges can range from simple drug possession to intent to distribute. We defend clients for all types of drug-related charges and will explore all possible defenses and alternative sentences when applicable.

Theft Crimes. Whether you are charged with shoplifting, grand theft, or fraud, we will develop defense strategies for your case. We know that theft allegations can have long-term effects on your future employment opportunities and will work to minimize those effects.

Traffic Violations. Some traffic tickets may seem minor, but multiple violations can lead to a license suspension and higher insurance rates. We help clients address traffic tickets to protect their driver’s licenses and keep their records clean.

Your Future

Criminal charges can have many consequences, including:

Professional Effects. A criminal conviction can affect your professional license, current employment, and future job opportunities. We know these stakes and will work to minimize the professional damages of criminal charges.

Personal Freedom. Many criminal charges carry the possibility of jail or prison time. Our main goal is to keep our clients free and help them get back to their normal lives as soon as possible.

Financial Consequences. Criminal cases involve big fines, court costs, and other financial penalties. We will minimize these financial burdens and develop payment plans when necessary.

Immigration Status. Criminal charges can have severe immigration consequences for non-citizens. We consider immigration implications in every aspect of our defense strategy for non-citizen clients.

Our Approach to Criminal Defense

Personalized Services

We don’t handle hundreds of cases like big law firms do. We limit our caseload so we can give each client the attention and time their case deserves.

Defense Planning

We start every case with a thorough review of the evidence and facts. Our team will identify weaknesses in the prosecution’s case and develop defense strategies tailored to each client’s specific situation and goals.

Case Management

The early stages of a criminal case are critical. We act fast to preserve evidence, interview witnesses while the memories are fresh, and start building your defense from day one. This proactive approach often means better results for our clients.

What to Do If You’re Charged

If you have been arrested or charged with a crime in Santa Clarita, you need to make a checklist of the steps you’ll need to take to ensure better results in your case. Make sure you:

  • Document everything during your arrest
  • Preserve the evidence, including photos, videos, and witness contacts
  • Don’t post on social media – prosecutors can use what you say against you
  • Follow court order – missing court dates or violating release conditions can hurt your case or trigger additional charges

Free Consultation

At the Farris Law Firm, we offer free initial consultations to discuss your case so you can learn more about how we can help. During your consultation, we will review:

  • The charges you are facing
  • The penalties and consequences
  • The defense strategies
  • The timeline for your case
  • Our fees and payment options
  • The next steps

Contact Santa Clarita’s Top Criminal Defense Attorneys Now

Don’t let criminal charges take over your life. At Farris, we believe that everyone deserves a fair defense, and we have a proven track record of success in representing clients in criminal defense matters. Contact the Farris Law Firm at (818) 861-0861 for a free consultation. Se habla español.
